title: DoNotContactEntry
description: Suppression-list entry for Dealix Acquisition OS v2. PII is stored only as a salted hash; raw phone/email are never persisted in this list. PDPL-first.

entry_id.description: Internal UUID for the suppression entry.

identifier_hash.description: Salted hash of the business contact identifier (phone or email). Raw value is NOT stored.

channel.description: Channel the opt-out applies to. 'all' suppresses every channel.

source_type.description: Provenance class of the original contact (never 'scraped' — disallowed).

permanent.description: If true, never re-contact. If false, eligible after cool-off (>=90 days).

notes.description: Governance note. Must NOT contain raw PII.
